ABOUT US

At VetConnect, veterinarians and farmers connect through a single digital platform designed to improve animal health and farm productivity.

Farmers can access trusted knowledge, locate and book certified veterinarians near them, receive real-time disease surveillance alerts, get daily animal health tips, and buy or sell veterinary products through the integrated E-Mart.

VC-AI

Get instant answers and animal care tips, anytime.

Drug Verification

Verify veterinary medicines to avoid counterfeit drugs.

• Scan QR code

• Type medication number manually

VetConnect supports safe veterinary practices by encouraging verification of medicines approved by National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC).

Privacy Policy â€“ VetConnect

Effective Date: March 2026
At VetConnect, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide when using our platform.

1. Information We Collect
We may collect the following information when you use VetConnect:

  • Personal details such as name, email address, and phone number
  • Account information when you register
  • Appointment and consultation details
  • Payment information for services
  • Device or usage data (such as browser type and pages visited)

2. How We Use Your Information
The information we collect is used to:

  • Provide veterinary consultation services
  • Allow users to book appointments with veterinarians
  • Process payments in the VetConnect E-Mart
  • Improve our platform and user experience
  • Send service updates or notifications

3. Data Protection
We take reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure.

4. Sharing of Information
VetConnect does not sell or rent user data. We may only share information with:

  • Licensed veterinarians providing services on the platform
  • Payment service providers for secure transactions
  • Legal authorities if required by law

5. Cookies and Tracking
Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve performance and personalize user experience.

6. Your Rights
Users have the right to:

  • Access their personal data
  • Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of their data

7. Third-Party Services
Some services on VetConnect may involve third-party providers such as payment processors or delivery services. Their privacy policies may also apply.

8. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.

9. Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact:
VetConnect Support
Email: support@vetconnect.com

Terms and Conditions â€“ VetConnect

Effective Date: March 2026
Welcome to VetConnect. By accessing or using this platform, you agree to the following Terms and Conditions.

1. Use of the Platform
VetConnect is a digital platform designed to connect animal owners, farmers, and veterinarians for veterinary consultation, appointment booking, and access to animal health services.
By using this platform, you agree to use the services lawfully and responsibly.

2. User Accounts
To access some services, users may be required to create an account.
Users agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Keep their login credentials secure
  • Be responsible for activities carried out under their account

VetConnect reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

3. Veterinary Consultation
VetConnect facilitates communication between veterinarians and animal owners.
However:

  • The platform does not replace physical veterinary examination where required
  • Users are responsible for following professional advice appropriately
  • VetConnect is not liable for outcomes resulting from misuse of information provided

4. Appointments and Services
Users may book veterinary services through the platform.
VetConnect does not guarantee:

  • Immediate availability of veterinarians
  • Accuracy of third-party service providers

5. E-Mart Purchases
Products purchased through the VetConnect E-Mart are subject to availability and pricing set by vendors.
VetConnect is not responsible for:

  • Manufacturer defects
  • Misuse of veterinary products
  • Delivery delays caused by third-party logistics

6. Acceptable Use
Users must not:

  • Use the platform for illegal activities
  • Upload harmful or misleading information
  • Attempt to hack, disrupt, or damage the system

Violations may result in account suspension or permanent ban.

7. Intellectual Property
All content on VetConnect, including text, design, logos, and software, belongs to VetConnect and may not be copied or distributed without permission.

8. Limitation of Liability
VetConnect provides services "as is." The platform is not responsible for:

  • Veterinary outcomes
  • Loss of data
  • Service interruption

9. Changes to the Terms
VetConnect may update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Continued use of the platform means you accept the updated terms.

10. Contact
If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, contact:
VetConnect Support
support@vetconnect.com

ACCOUNT +

â€¢ How do I create an account?
Click Sign Up, enter your email/phone number, and follow the verification steps.

â€¢ I forgot my password. What should I do?
Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the reset instructions.

â€¢ Can I update my profile information?
Yes. Go to Account Settings and edit your profile details.

â€¢ Do I need an account to use VetConnect?
Some features like booking appointments require an account.

SERVICES +

â€¢ What services does VetConnect offer?
VetConnect provides consultations, appointment booking, an animal health e-mart, and an AI veterinary chatbot.

â€¢ Can I consult a vet online?
Yes. You can chat with or schedule a video consultation with licensed veterinarians.

â€¢ What animals does VetConnect support?
We support livestock, pets, poultry, and other farm animals.

â€¢ Is the AI chatbot a real veterinarian?
No. The AI provides guidance but does not replace professional veterinary care.

BOOKINGS & APPOINTMENT +

â€¢ How do I book a veterinary appointment?
Go to Book Appointment, select a vet, choose a date and time, then confirm.

â€¢ Can I cancel an appointment?
Yes. You can cancel or reschedule through the Appointments section.

â€¢ Will I receive a reminder?
Yes. You will receive notifications before your appointment.

PAYMENT +

â€¢ What payment methods are accepted?
We support debit cards, bank transfers, and mobile payments.

â€¢ Are consultations paid or free?
Some services are free, but consultations may require payment depending on the veterinarian.

â€¢ Is payment secure?
Yes. VetConnect uses secure payment systems to protect your transactions.

CONTACT & SUPPORT +

â€¢ How can I contact VetConnect support?
You can reach us via email, phone, or the in-app support chat.

â€¢ How long does support take to respond?
Most inquiries are answered within 24 hours.

â€¢ How do I report a problem with the platform?
Use the Report Issue option in the Help section.
